title: jasminum pubescens var. bracteatum
intro: Jasminum pubescens var. bracteatum is a plant species, commonly known as the Himalayan jasmine, which is a variant of the Jasminum pubescens. The Himalayan jasmine has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders. The herbal preparations of the Himalayan jasmine include tea infusions and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
